distilleries.name: Brennerei Mees
distilleries.description: Small family manufactory in Briedel with over nine decades of distilling. Michael Mees works from regional fruit and Mosel grape marc, producing brandies, a Mosel gin and single malt whisky alongside liqueurs.
distilleries.distillation_method: Small-batch pot distillation from regional fruit and grape pomace
distilleries.tasting_program: Visitors can watch the distilling, tour the manufactory and taste the range from fruit brandy to gin and whisky

distilleries.name: Brennerei Hubertus Vallendar
distilleries.description: Respected Lower Mosel distillery in Kail known for precise fruit brandies and spirits. A modern Destithek tasting hall and the Vallendar Academy offer visits and hands-on distilling courses.
distilleries.distillation_method: Pot-still distillation of carefully selected regional and exotic fruits
distilleries.tasting_program: Tasting hall (Destithek) open to visitors; distilling courses through the Vallendar Academy

distilleries.name: Brennerei Springiersbacher Hof
distilleries.description: Estate distillery attached to the town wall of Ediger near the steep Calmont. The Borchert family distils grape marc and fruit brandies, including an ice-wine Tresterbrand, and explains the process to visitors over a tasting.
distilleries.distillation_method: Pot-still distillation of grape marc and orchard fruit
distilleries.tasting_program: Distillery visits with the Borchert family, who serve fruit brandies and liqueurs while explaining distillation

distilleries.name: Weingut und Brennerei KDM
distilleries.description: Combined wine estate and distillery of Kerstin and Detlef Mueller in Kroev. Distils Mosel grape marc into grappa-style spirit plus a grape-and-peach gin and cask-aged expressions, all from estate fruit.
distilleries.distillation_method: Pot distillation of estate grape pomace and fruit; cask ageing in various wood types

distilleries.name: Weingut und Edelbranntwein-Brennerei Hans Beth
distilleries.description: Generations-old Kroev wine and brandy house combining a working winery with a fruit-brandy distillery. The shop pours and sells its Mosel wines, Sekt, grape marc and fruit brandies and liqueurs on site.
distilleries.distillation_method: Traditional pot distillation of grape pomace and orchard fruit
distilleries.tasting_program: Tasting and sales of spirits and wines at the on-site Weinladen
